post.subject: Is there a place?
post.body: Im just back from the cinema. I decided to spontaniously go to see Finding Neverland. The latest film staring Johnny Depp(!!) is just as good as any other, in terms of his performance anyway, the film was also very good. No really it was. A little tearful i was in some parts. I certainly feel a lot better myself having taken myself away from all that has been making me feel so down lately. It is nice to get away from things for a while.
